economic_notes: First Nation holds 100% ownership in Kosisiminawak Development Corporation (no activity in year). Investment in Willeson Metals Corporation (100,000 common shares received pursuant to Exploration Agreement). Multiple housing projects under construction including 5 ISC housing units, 5 duplex housing units, 15 ready-to-move housing units, CMHC 3 and 2 housing units, Band Office, and Water Treatment Plant Generator. Total construction in progress $14,324,003.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to verify construction in progress balances; prior year had a disclaimer of opinion. Prior year figures restated for: (1) reversal of premature amortization on housing units under construction, (2) capitalization of Water Treatment Plant Generator project expenses, (3) recognition of professional fees paid by third party as revenue. Honoraria for Chief and Council totalled $195,276 but no detailed remuneration schedule provided. Construction in progress is $14,324,003 and is a significant balance. Kosisiminawak Development Corporation is 100% owned subsidiary with no activity. Net debt position is $5,785,105. Deferred revenue balance is $4,016,399. Multiple litigation contingencies exist including claims against First Nation totalling $150,650 and counterclaims of $2,000,000. CMHC replacement reserve is underfunded by $447,971.
